economic_notes: Deer Cable provides cable, phone and internet services to the community. Economic Development activities to increase economic opportunities. Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership revenue from gaming settlement with Province of Ontario.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to inability to confirm completeness of Asset Retirement Obligation (ARO) liabilities under PS 3280. Long-term debt balance was truncated in source text (CMHC mortgages mentioned but full balance not captured). expenses_housing combines Band Housing (1,416,232) and CMHC Housing (455,484). TCA net book value not captured due to truncated Schedule 1. total_government_transfers includes ISC (29,014,150) + Ministry of Community and Social Services (2,373,667) + Ministry of Health and Long Term Care (547,115) + Sioux Lookout Area Aboriginal Management Board (639,513) + CMHC (265,149) + Nishnawbe Aski Nation (354158) + OFNLP (1,572,034) = 34,786,786; OSR = rent + interest + other revenue = 475,386 + 105,518 + 3,479,678 - deferred adjustments approximated. 13 consolidated departments/segments. Province is Ontario (ON), not Alberta.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
High ISC dependency (76.05%) — operations heavily reliant on federal transfers
